{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Purelake School
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The disciples of the [[Purelake School]] are numerous in the [[Desolate Wilds]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1">''Blackflame'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Chen]] will stay with the [[Purelake School]] for a while.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6">''Blackflame'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
